headline: Expanding Rural Healthcare Access With Technology
summary: NORTHAMPTON, MA / ACCESS Newswire / March 24, 2026 / Access to healthcare remains uneven across the United States, with rural communities facing growing gaps in care. At HIMSS 2026, Melanie Krause, Leidos QTC's senior vice president of enabling operations ...

headline: Senate, White House start to coalesce around ending DHS shutdown amid TSA delays
summary: The Department of Homeland Security has been shut down since February over Democratic concerns about its immigration enforcement policies.
